LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WILLIAM YAO'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE IS GRANTED. (CCP SEC. 397(A).) THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY. PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY ALL TRANSFER COSTS. PLAINTIFF ADMITS IN ITS OPPOSITION THAT THERE WAS NO BASIS FOR FILING THE COMPLAINT IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY. MR. YAO TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976 (302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - WILLIAM YAO, TEL. NO. (626) 320-4059, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WILLIAM YAO's Motion To Change Venue is Granted. (CCP sec. 397(a).) The case is transferred to Los Angeles County. Plaintiff shall pay all transfer costs. Plaintiff admits in its opposition that there was no basis for filing the complaint in San Francisco County. MR. YAO TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue
Off Calendar Sep-05-2014 Continued To Sep-25-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT WILLIAM YAO'S Motion To Change Venue is continued to September 25, 2014, to give the moving party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/eg
